name: Chicken Fajitas
recipeIngredient: 1 large onion, peeled and cut into 1/2 inch slices
1 green bell pepper, seeded and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Flatten the chicken breasts to a 1/2 inch thickness between two sheets of plastic wrap using a mallet or rolling pin.
2. Place the flattened chicken breasts in a glass baking dish.
3. In a blender, combine olive oil, lime juice, garlic, cilantro, jalapeno, and salt and pepper. Blend until smooth and pour over the chicken.
4. Cover with plastic wrap and let marinate for 30 minutes.
5. Heat a large skillet over medium heat with olive oil.
6. Add onions and peppers to the skillet and cook until tender and beginning to brown.
7. In a 9x13 glass baking dish, toss potatoes with remaining olive oil and seasonings.
8. Bake in a 375 degree oven for about 30 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
9. Heat a cast iron grill pan or outdoor grill.
10. Toast flour tortillas for about 30 seconds per side and keep warm in an aluminum foil pocket.
11. Grill the marinated chicken on each side for approximately 45 minutes.
12. Slice the cooked chicken into even strips.
13. Serve hot with onions, peppers, potatoes, grated jack cheese, salsa, and sour cream.
